Hotels in Monastiraki, Athens

Vibrant Market District

5 Hotels
€120 Avg/Night
8-12 min to Acropolis

Quick answer

Monastiraki is best for Shoppers, Foodies, Budget travelers.

Monastiraki is a vibrant market district area with 5 tracked hotels averaging about €120/night. In this dataset, 5 hotels show an Acropolis-view signal and 4 hotels show a rooftop-bar signal. The lowest tracked nightly price signal is €35 at Athens Backpackers.

Compare hotels Booking notes FAQs

About Monastiraki

Bustling flea market, street food, and lively atmosphere. Home to the famous Monastiraki Square with views of the Acropolis and ancient Agora.

VibrantMarketsNightlife
Best for: Shoppers, Foodies, Budget travelers

What to Know Before Booking in Monastiraki

Best-fit traveler

Monastiraki works especially well for shoppers, foodies, budget travelers. If that is not your trip style, compare nearby alternatives before booking.

Price signal

The tracked Monastiraki hotels average about €120 per night, with actual rates changing by date, room type, and cancellation policy.

Location signal

Monastiraki is listed as 8-12 min from the Acropolis in this dataset. Confirm the exact hotel address and transit route before booking.

FAQs: Staying in Monastiraki

Is Monastiraki a good area to stay in Athens?

Yes. Monastiraki is bustling flea market, street food, and lively atmosphere. It is especially useful for shoppers, foodies, budget travelers.

How far is Monastiraki from the Acropolis?

Monastiraki is 8-12 min walk from the Acropolis. Monastiraki is listed as 8-12 min from the Acropolis in the Hotels of Athens neighborhood data. Exact walking time depends on the individual hotel address and entrance used.

What's the average hotel price in Monastiraki?

Hotels in Monastiraki average around €120 per night. Tracked hotels in Monastiraki average around €120 per night, with the visible dataset spanning 5 options. Confirm live rates before booking.
